blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
